Types

SegmentEntry = object
  genCol*: int
  sourceIdx*: int
  origLine*: int
  origCol*: int
  nameIdx*: int
SourceMap = ref object
  file*: string
  sources*: seq[string]
  sourcesContent*: seq[string]
  names*: seq[string]
  nameTable*: Table[string, int]
  lines*: seq[seq[SegmentEntry]]
